data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for peak vs off-peak hours.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Peak vs off-peak hours' requirement. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the system's handling of peak and off-peak hours. The evidence primarily focuses on booking confirmations and member interactions without demonstrating how the system differentiates between peak and off-peak hours, which constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence showing how the system differentiates between peak and off-peak hours.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
